_translation_notes: Pulaar translation — DRAFT. Please review with Mike Ba before publishing.
This is the Pulaar of Futa Tooro (northern Senegal/Mauritania) — the dialect of the Dagana/Saint-Louis belt.
Pulaar orthography follows the official Senegalese Latin-based standard.
Moringa in Pulaar: 'néböday' — sourced from Burkill's Useful Plants of West Tropical Africa (1985), JSTOR Global Plants, confirmed for Fula-Pulaar and Toucouleur communities in Senegal.
Agricultural vocabulary sourced from Peace Corps Pulaar resources and Fula language research materials.
Terms flagged VERIFY WITH MIKE require native speaker confirmation, especially noun class agreements.
Pulaar has a complex noun class system (about 20 classes). Class markers vary by noun category.
Duckweed, Azolla, Spirulina: no documented Pulaar common names found — descriptive phrases used.
French and Arabic loanwords retained where no Pulaar equivalent is documented.
hero_title:
Ceerugol Tinndirgol Leydi
e Saare Senegaal yu Woɗɗii
hero_sub: Tabitingol ganndal e dente yu ɓuttii e ñiɓɓol mbinndanɗe ngam dartagol ɓiɗɗo ɗiɗo e ndiyam — e ko ganndal hoolaaki ko waawi jeyeede duuɓi.
hero_meta_subjects: Ko faati: Néböday · Nanndu ndiyam · Azolla · Spirulina
hero_meta_context: Ko faati: Saare Senegaal e Pulaar e Wolof
toc_items: Ɓerɗe buuɗuki — ko Senegaal leydi ngoni e nder hannde
Dente nay ɗee — ganndal, ɓiɗɗo e jibinannde
Ko ganndal hoolaaki — ko laatorii tan e ko waawi laatoraade
Diiwaan ooɓungol — noy dente ɗee ñamoondira e ɓeyda hannde
Jikke e teddungal — ko waawi walliteede e ko
part1_body1: Senegaal leydi ngoli saare — ɓe ngona nder Kolda, Matam, Tambacounda e Kaffrine — ngona e ɗiɗi ɓerɗe baaɗi. Nokkuuji adunankooji ladde maayo Senegaal ɓurii ɗo jokkondirde e ndiyam. Ko 3% rekk garɗo ngesa ngoni e sisteem ñannaango, kono faa haa miliyoŋ ɗiɗi hekaare mawɗi paabi ngesa ngoni. Liggeeji ngesa ngam ngorotoori ley mawnde na wuuri to bannge ɗiɗi jarige.
part1_body2: Ko ɗum addana ɗum laaboruɗe e fannu nanngu ganndal woni: ɓerɗe ɗee ko ɓerɗe ganndal wonaa ɓerɗe safaara tan. Ñaawooje ngam dartaade suɗɗudi e ndiyam ngoni e leydi ngoni ɗoo, oo koyɗe, moɗanaaka, ganndanaaka, walla waɗaa fewre. Ko wonaa e fannu.
callout_thesis: « Sappo e ɗiɗi e teemeɗe Matam ngona e kañum ɓiɗɗo suuɗuki — kono néböday lekki ngoni yaltude nder leydi ndii, faa waawi nyaamde. Ɗuum wonaa ɓerɗe safaara. Ɓerɗe ganndal ndi. »
failure_modes_intro: Coftal ɗee nafooje ngoni tabitaaɗe e ganndal e takkooji ngesa:
failure_modes: Nyaamaari waɗata e ɓannge wumri coftal ñiɓɓol
Ndiyam waɗata e alkaali ɓuri selin kono ko ɓuuɓɓinaaji ngoni e leydi
Nyaamaari weendu jeyaaɗi jeyaa ko remooɓe ngaari, kono dente ndiyam yu ɓuri laɗɗi ngoni waawde heɓeede e mbottu
Leydi oo hoolaaki ngam ngesa gooto, kono dente ñiɓɓol azote ngoni e ngesa oo tawee gaa weedooji tan
Ngesa nokkuure ngam tawde rekk kono ko yooɗi ndiyam rewindaani e dente yu ɓuri yaawde ngaari mbeewi saasone tati
failure_modes_outro: Dente nay ɗee takkooji nder takkooji nay ɗee, so sikkiima e junngude.
part2_intro: Dente ɗee peeje ngona toppitaaɗe ngam: (a) tabitaaɗe nder Afrik, (b) laaboruɗe e safaara ɓurnde yoornude, (c) nyaamaari walla ngesa e ñalɗi, wonaa duuɓi, e (d) ñamoondira so waɗiraa sisteem.

duckweed.name: Lemna / Wolffia spp.
duckweed.local: Dente ndiyam — ngoni nder ndiyam [VERIFY WITH MIKE: no documented Pulaar name]

azolla.name: Azolla pinnata
azolla.local: Dente ndiyam — jeyaa Senegaal [VERIFY WITH MIKE: no documented Pulaar name]

spirulina.name: Arthrospira platensis
spirulina.local: Spirulina — nyaamaari daande Tchad [VERIFY WITH MIKE: no documented Pulaar name]

moringa_body1: Ɗuum ko goonga mawɗo. Néböday woni e Senegaal. Jeyaama e nde wonaa ONG ardi — kono jeyaa fewre. Ko laatorii tan mooy: kaaƴe dente ndee nder ndiyam mbaɗata ɗiɗi walla tati laɓɓe, e jefde ndiyam ko ɓuri yaawnude. Ko ɗum defa ñebbe vitamiini A e suuɗuki laabi.
moringa_body2: Jiɓɓol dente néböday — seeɗaaɗo e ɗaɓɓitere — siwtata vitamiini A 50 faa 70%, e mbaɗetee e nokkuure sauce walla thiéboudiène e cikka.
moringa_body3: Ñebbe ɗee ko ɓalli wootere wuurdunde e moɗanaande. Jiɓɓol ñebbe ɗee, so ɓennginii nder ndiyam muusaɗo, naata coagulant naturel. Laabi ñebbe ɗee ñamoondira e coftal — argile, bacterie, toxin — e ɓeyda ñamoondiri e wuurnude. Kore mbi: 90 faa 99% impuretés ɓennii. Wonaa ko ɓura, kono e SODIS — ndiyam nder flakon plastik nder naange 6 waktu — naata ndiyam moƴƴi ngam galle e e safaara.
video_moringa_caption: Demonstration toppitaare néböday ngam ɓeydeeki dente.
duckweed_title: Dente Ndiyam: Usine Gaawunde Laabi e Adunankaaji
duckweed_body1: Dente ndiyam ɓeydii ɗiɗi biomasse am e ñalɗi ɗiɗi ci tati. Laabi am — 35 faa 45% seeɗaɗo — ɓuri soya (36%) e ñamoondira e legumineuse. Wolffia mooy dente mawnde mawɗe ngam nyaamaari aadee. Nder Afrik Fuɗnaange, jeyaari gariiɓunde mooy nyaamaari liɗɗi e ganndunde — mbaɗetee lekki jeyaaɗo nder marché.
duckweed_body2: Dente ndiyam waawi bioremediation, siftina 85% azote e phosphate nder ndiyam wumral. Ndiyam yaltunde ngoo moƴƴii e naata cycle irrigation.
azolla_body1: Azolla pinnata jeyaa Afrik e Senegaal. Woni ɗoo hannde. Ko laatorii tan: remooɓe ngari ngoni toowii ko baawto rekk. Ñamoondire am e Anabaena azollae addana am siminnaade azote — naata engrais moƴƴo mbaɗetee e ñiɓɓol azote synthétique nder mbaalu mum. Kore ngoni gollaaɗe nder maayo Senegaal (Saint-Louis) tabitii.
azolla_body2: E timmude ko faati e fertilisation, azolla jeyeende woni 20 faa 30% laabi. Ganndunooɓe nder Rwanda e Kenya jeyii ko ngoni e nyaamaari, e kori ɓeydeeki maɓɓe suuɗuki coolooji. Toppitaare: bassin suuɗuki walla fosse (20 faa 60 cm), ndiyam moƴƴo e culture souche. Ɓeydii ñalɗi tati faa jowi. Bonus: taɓɓorgal azolla e ndiyam suɗa 90% larves moosade — dartagol moosade ngam nyaamaari.
spirulina_body1: Spirulina ko dente mawnde ñiɓɓunde nder nay ɗee. E 55 faa 70% laabi seeɗaɗo, e vitamiini B12, béta-carotène, fer e acides gras, cuillère à soupe gooto kala ñalawma taabitinii ɓeydeeki kono ɓiɓɓe ɓe ngoni e suuɗudi e ñalɗi seeɗaɗi. Système Intégré ci Farende, Togo (1987) taabitii e bannge village — bassin 100 m² waawi ɓeydeeki nyaamaari 100 ɓiɓɓe kala ñalawma.
spirulina_body2: Spirulina nde ɓuuri tecnik. pH 8.5–11, heat 25–35°C — e Sahel — e kontrolu contamination. Naange e heat Sahel ko ɗoon baawnuɗe. Coolooji mbaɗetee 60 faa 70% e safaara lokkal.
video_spirulina_caption: Guide pratique ngam toppitaare spirulina suuɗuki nder nokkuure tropical.
part3_intro: Ɗuum ko bilan ngenndi e ko laatorii tan ak ko ganndal e terrain taabitii waawi laatoraade.
table_rows: Toppitaare néböday
Kaaƴe dente ɗiɗi walla tati, jefde ndiyam. Suwa 60–80% vitamiini A. Dente jeyeende jeyaa so wonii.
Seeɗa dente e ɗaɓɓitere, jiɓɓo, yokko e sauce. Siwtata 50–70% vitamiini A. Cuillère à soupe wootere ~100% AJR vitamiini A ɓiɗɗo.
Ñaandu seeɗingol néböday
Seeɗaade nder naange ko laatorii. Suwa vitamiini A e UV.
Seeɗaade nder daaɓa siwtata 50–70% ak 20–40% nder naange. Safaara ɓurde. Daaɓa rekk.
Jeyaari ñebbe néböday
Ñebbe ngoni tewɗe walla jefaaɗe. Dente jeyaa ngam brise-vent rekk.
Jiɓɓol ñebbe sifinana 1 litre ndiyam muusaɗo e ~2 ñebbe. E SODIS, ndiyam moƴƴo — e safaara.
Toppitaare ndiyam
Ndiyam maayo walla caɗeeli nyaamaata e toppitaare. Walla alum cher. Ɓerɗe ndiyam ko mawɗe e suɗɗudi.
Coagulation néböday ñebbe + SODIS ngoni koo fuu, safaara ɓuurnde. Ganndal e 6 waktu naange rekk.
Toppitaare néböday
Dente ngoni e cikka, espacement mawndo e ombrage.
Toppitaare intensive (50 cm) ɓeyda dente to dente tawee to ɓuri 1 mètre. 4 faa 8 laabi bari biomasse e m².
Ganndal Azolla
A. pinnata jeyaa, tawee e baawto rekk.
Bassin (fosse 20–60 cm) waaɗa lekki laabi kala ñalawma. Double ñalɗi tati faa jowi. Ñiɓɓo azote ngam irrigation.
Intrants mbaalu
Engrais azoté (DAP) jeyaa e jeyaari. Colo e chaîne approvisionnement.
Azolla intercalaire e mbaalu (Saint-Louis taabitii) huuɓuda azote synthétique, siwtata rendements.
Coolooji lekki weendu
Lekki commercial jeyaa. Cher, suɗɗudi weendu, ɓeydeeki suuɗuki.
Bassin dente ndiyam + azolla mbaɗetee e mbottu mbaɗetee e flakon mbaawi huuɓude 30 faa 80% lekki. Coolooji: feuille plastik e mbottu.
Triage suɗɗudi ɓiɓɓe
Suɗɗudi mawndi toppitaa e centres de santé e nyaamaari thérapeutique jeyaaɗo.
Toppitaare spirulina e bannge village (bassin 100 m² ɓeyda nyaamaari 100 ɓiɓɓe/ñalawma) taabitii e Togo, Burkina Faso, Mali.
Wumral leydi
Ngesa gooto suuwa leydi. Jachère, ñebbere koro e engrais chimiques.
Doggol néböday siwtata ndiyam e leydi. Azolla ɓeyda leydi wumraandi.
Dartagol moosade
Traitements chimiques, moustiquaires walla walaa. Paludisme ɓeyda suɗɗudi.
Taɓɓorgal azolla e ndiyam suɗa 90% larves moosade. Dartagol moosade yara ngam nyaamaari.
part4_intro: Dente nay ɗee wonaa interventions e bannge — ngoni e sisteem nder boucle fermée fo sortie koo naata entrée koo. Ɗuum ko ganndal ɓesngu ONG ngoni yooɗinaani e yoɓtaade dente e bannge.
system_caption: Azote ñiɓɓungol e azolla ɓeyda ndiyam irrigation ngesa. Jiɓɓol néböday yokkaa e nyaamaari ngesa ɗee. Bassin spirulina nyaamaata e ndiyam wees ɗee, harvest ngam toppitaare ɓiɓɓe. Sisteem oo jeyaa naange, ndiyam e dente.
part4_body: Ko faati mawɗo: ndiyam naata connecteur. Goɗɗo ɗo ndiyam nder — walla borehole walla mare saisonnière — mbaɗetee toppitaa e ñebbe néböday, azolla e dente ndiyam e bannge ngam lekki, e alimenter bassin spirulina. Ko ɓurii ndiyam toppitaa, ko ɓuuri sisteem yaada. Ko sisteem yaadata, ko ɓuuri ndiyam hoolaaka ngam dente ndiyam e azolla ngoni e mares, suuɗa évaporation.
part5_intro: Yantugol e laaboraaji e jangande ganndal. Tati ɗee ɓurnaaɗe mbaɗetee e guide illustrée e demonstration.

priorities.title: Wéccal ñaandu noy seeɗa e ndes dente néböday
priorities.body: Ɗuum ko changement ɓurndo naafa e safaara tawde. Ko ina waawi nde nit mboolii: jokkude seeɗaade e naange, fuɗɗude seeɗaade e daaɓa. Carte illustrée wootere mbaawi tati nafu dente oo. Poolaaki: kala galle ngo ngoodi e néböday. Ñalnde: affiche wolof/pulaar wakkati nde waya seeɗaade naange ak daaɓa e différence vitamiini A.

priorities.title: Newude toppitaare ndiyam e néböday ñebbe + SODIS nder galle
priorities.body: Ɓerɗe ndiyam ko mawɗe e suɗɗudi (junngo → absorptiion suuɗuki). Jiɓɓol ñebbe + SODIS wonaa médicament, wonaa infrastructure, e safaara. Démonstration e flakon ndiyam muusaɗo fuu ñalta. Siftina 60–85% bactérie coliformes e toppitaare bu kanam.

priorities.title: Wéccal azolla ci 'baawto' ci 'dente moƴƴo' e pilote nder mbottu
priorities.body: A. pinnata jeyaa e Senegaal. Saare ngo ngoodi e ndiyam ngondi e ko ina waawi. Intervention: fosse walla mbottu mawɗo (bidon, bassin, trou), ndiyam e culture souche. E ñalɗi tati faa jowi, harvest ɓurnde ngam ganndunde. Parcelle démonstration e école walla poste de santé ko ɗoon ɓurndi.

priorities.title: Newude technique toppitaare intensive néböday e remooɓe ngoni ɗoo
priorities.body: Bari néböday ngoni e ombrage e espacement 2–3 m. Toppitaare dente ñalnde espacement 50 cm e taille dente to ɓuri 1 mètre. FIMOSEN e Counterpart International taabitii e Kolda e Ziguinchor. Différence rendement: 4 faa 8 laabi bari biomasse e m².

priorities.title: Deploy bassins dente ndiyam ngam lekki liɗɗi nder opérations tilapia
priorities.body: Dente ndiyam waawi huuɓude lekki commercial cher ngam liɗɗi. Wona e bannge ndiyam, double ñalɗi ɗiɗi faa tati, harvest e jefde frais. Ferma boucle laabi e safaara.

priorities.title: Ɗam bassin communautaire spirulina e postes de santé ngam suɗɗudi ɓiɓɓe
priorities.body: Ɗuum ko ɓuri tecnik, kono ko jaɓɓaare moƴƴo ngam suɗɗudi mawndi. Bassin 100 m² toppitaaɗo e debbo ɓe mbaawi ɓeydeeki 100 ɓiɓɓe kala ñalawma. Ñalnde surveillance pH, thermomètre, e seeɗaade e daaɓa. Agents de santé ko ɗoon nafooji ngam formo e distribution.

tech_risks: Toppitaare ndiyam e néböday ñebbe wonaa solution hiiɗunde. Jiɓɓol ñebbe suuɗa turbidité e bactérie, kono ndiyam toɓti OMS e pathogènes. Ko toppitaare bu kanam ñalnde SODIS etaap bu ɗiɗi. Wural koo ngam purification tan.

Jikke contamination spirulina. Spirulina commercial wii traces cyanotoxines. Spirulina village e souche moƴƴo (Arthrospira platensis, wonaa cyanobactéries sauvages) nder conditions kontrolées, kono contrôle qualité ina waawi. Wural harvest sauvage e ndiyam naturels e vérification souche.
Azolla e Sahel ina waawi jikke heat. Projections montrent Sahel mbaawi ɓuri laɗɗi ngam azolla faa 2050. Sahaa feewre (Disembre faa Mee) ko ɗoon ɓurndi ngam ɗam stocks kulturaux.
Dente ndiyam mbaawi ɓeyda dente ndiyam e so amdi confinement. Toppitaare e bassins confinés walla sections délimitées. Dente ndiyam e ndiyam libre e gestion mbaawi fentaade lumière e dégradation.
social_risks: Ɗaɓɓere nyaamaari ɓuri jikkeede. Thiéboudiène nyaamaata so tati kala ñalawma. Interventions ɗe ngoni e yokkude ko heɓii ngoni e jaayirde e ɓuri ñalnde ɗe ngoni e nyaamaade ko heɓaani. Jiɓɓol néböday e sauce, wonaa salade néböday, ko ɗoon ɓurndi. Taabitii e Peace Corps e Kolda.

Debbo ɓe ko cible moƴƴo ngam ganndal, kono mbaaɗetee e acteurs, wonaa bénéficiaires. Ɓesngu debbo e Kolda, Vélingara e Ziguinchor taabitii entreprises autonomes toppitaare néböday. Modèle oo mooy ɓesngu debbo ɗe ngoni e activités, wonaa bénéficiaires.

Diffusion ganndal e safaara valeur économique ɓeydii. Projets e formo ɓesngu kono wonaa jofnude mécanisme revenu ngoni e arrêtaade ONG woo. Kala transfert ganndal ñalnde mécanisme revenu: vente jiɓɓol néböday, vente cultures azolla e saare, production comprimés spirulina e réseaux santé.
callout_leverage: Ko nati weesu wonaa ñebbe, bassin walla liggeeji. Ko honno ganndal toppitaare hoolaaki e làmmbé lokkal ngam weltinirde ko changement oo nafata e hol noy waɗude.
leverage_body: Ɓesngu Senegaal ngoni e golliiɗe nder ɗoo: FIMOSEN, CREATE! (ñalnde toppitaare 2 500 dente/duuɓi), Counterpart International (Matam) e Corps de la Paix. Ko nati weesu wonaa infrastructure — ko diffusion latérale ganndal e bannge saare.
footer_note: Ganndal tooɗtaaɗo Avrilu 2026 ngam laaboraaje dartagol ɓiɗɗo ɗiɗo e ndiyam e bannge saare. © Jesse Joel Rogers & Mike Ba — CC BY-NC 4.0
